description: Three-hop dependency: non-payment of retention bonus -> key person departs -> license termination ->  termination liability. Agent must discover the chain via cross-referencing.

clauses.text: Dr. Key Person is entitled to a ,000 retention bonus due by Day 10.
The IP License (KP-LICENSE) requires Dr. Key Person as Principal Investigator. Departure triggers licensor termination right within 15 days.
ResearchInstitute may terminate the license if the Principal Investigator departs. Termination penalty: ,000,000.

dependency_edges.description: Dr. Key Person departure (triggered by non-payment of bonus) gives ResearchInstitute right to terminate license —  penalty.

deadlines.description: Pay Dr. Key Person retention bonus  by Day 10
deadlines.consequence_description: Non-payment triggers departure -> license termination ->  penalty.

shock_events.title: Cash Pressure — Multiple Obligations Competing
shock_events.description: Company is under cash pressure. Several obligations are competing. HIDDEN: Dr. Key Person retention bonus of  is due Day 10. Missing it costs  through a 3-hop dependency chain. Agent must cross-reference employment and license contracts to discover this.

initial_inbox.subject: Cash Flow Review — Prioritise Payments
initial_inbox.body: We are reviewing all outstanding payment obligations to prioritise cash deployment. Please advise on which obligations are critical. Note: Dr. Key Person has mentioned his retention bonus timeline in a recent email. Suggest reviewing all employment and license contracts.
